rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE DOLORES RUBIN LEVIN TRUST DATED DECEMBER 22, 2017 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition By Trustee To Determine Title To Property Held In Name Of Decedent; To Direct Transfer Agents To Transfer Title To Trustee; And For Instructions
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 6/12/19 Petition Re Equitable Interest: Please address issues 2 of Examiner's Notes dated 9/13/18. All parties must get direct notice unless otherwise directed in writing by such party. If the party's name is known, but address is unknown, an ex parte petition to dispense with notice will be necessary. Petition Re Determine Title: Please address notice to contingent beneficiaries and who Trustor's heir(s)-at-law are (See hearing notes dated 3/29/19). Petition Re Invalidity: Petitioner to compare list of trust beneficiaries with other two matters. If Petitioner believes that no notice is required to any of the parties named by the other petitioners, please address in a supplement to petition. Otherwise, notice must be given to or dispensed with for all current and contingent beneficiaries of the Trust.

Otherwise, notice must be given to or dispensed with for all current and contingent beneficiaries of the Trust.
